message:
fix: hold federationEnvMutex for all withPeerCredentials calls (bd-wn3n)

When a peer had no credentials, the mutex was skipped, allowing concurrent
goroutines with credentials to set DOLT_REMOTE_USER/PASSWORD env vars that
could leak into the unprotected fn() call. Now the mutex is always held,
ensuring all federation operations are properly serialized.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
